title: Tempting Roasted Slovakian Tofu Casserole
description: A hearty vegan dish featuring roasted tofu and szechuan peppercorns in a rich mother sauce base, served in a mason jar.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the toasted and ground szechuan peppercorns, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
In a large bowl, toss the cubed tofu with the olive oil, chopped onion, and minced garlic until the tofu is evenly coated.
Sprinkle the szechuan peppercorn mixture over the tofu and toss to combine.
Transfer the tofu mixture to a mason jar and pour the mother sauce base over the top.
Cover the mason jar with a lid and roast in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sauce is molten and the tofu is golden brown.
Remove the mason jar from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the casserole hot, straight from the mason jar.
